# v1.9.0 — Broad-class completeness and project-bound evidence

- Select BANKSY whole-tissue resolution for broad-class recall and purity, not cluster count.
- Preserve embedded weak lineages across resolutions and allow direct cross-lineage reconstruction.
- Validate project-local ancestry for every derived expression object.
- Add a query-derived post-Atlas review of present and zero-census broad classes.
- Separate canonical Oocyte recall from evidence-only spatial context.
- Reject graph-sensitivity “rescues” that only increase cluster count.
